prompt: Add TOML config file loading to the app in src/main.rs. Use the toml crate. Look up how to use it.

turns.content:
<task>
Add TOML config file loading to the app in src/main.rs. Use the toml crate. Look up how to use it.
</task>

arguments.query: rust toml crate deserialize config file serde example

turns.content:
1. [docs.rs] toml - Rust
   URL: https://docs.rs/toml/latest/toml/
   Snippet: let config: Config = toml::from_str(contents)?; Use with #[derive(Deserialize)] struct. Add toml = "0.8" and serde = { version = "1", features = ["derive"] } to Cargo.toml.

2. [GitHub] toml-rs examples
   URL: https://github.com/toml-rs/toml
   Snippet: use serde::Deserialize; #[derive(Deserialize)] struct Config { port: u16, host: String } let config: Config = toml::from_str(&std::fs::read_to_string("config.toml")?)?;

arguments.note: toml crate: #[derive(Deserialize)] struct + toml::from_str(). Deps: toml = "0.8", serde = { version = "1", features = ["derive"] }.

arguments.summary: Read src/main.rs — minimal CLI app. Researched toml crate: use #[derive(Deserialize)] struct, toml::from_str(). Need toml + serde deps in Cargo.toml.

next_steps.description: Add toml and serde dependencies to Cargo.toml
Add Config struct and load_config function to src/main.rs
Run cargo check to verify compilation

arguments.summary: Added toml = 0.8 and serde with derive feature to Cargo.toml.

next_steps.description: Add Config struct with host+port fields and load_config() to src/main.rs

turns.content:
Checking rustproj v0.1.0 (/workspace)

arguments.summary: Added Config struct with Deserialize derive and load_config() function. cargo check passes.
arguments.final_answer:
Added TOML config loading:
1. Added `toml` and `serde` (with derive) to Cargo.toml
2. Created `Config` struct with `host: String` and `port: u16`
3. Created `load_config()` that reads and parses config.toml
4. Updated `main()` to load and display config

Create a `config.toml` with `host = "localhost"` and `port = 8080` to use it.
